metadata.name: Frost Alert and Mitigation for an Orchard

description: The weather forecast indicates temperatures will drop below freezing, threatening an apple orchard that is in bloom.

nodes.task_description: Receive a frost alert based on the weather forecast.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the alert for impending sub-zero temperatures.

nodes.task_description: Send a high-priority notification to the orchard manager to prepare frost mitigation measures.
Provide instructions to activate the overhead sprinkler irrigation system for frost protection, which releases latent heat as water freezes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a checklist and activation commands for the irrigation-based frost protection system.
